Name: Add connector to path
Description: User opens a path, selects two nodes to connect, creates a new connector between them, configures connector properties, and saves the path. This workflow represents the fundamental connectivity operation in path design.

ActivitySignature.Description: User searches for the path to modify (optional)
User opens a path workspace for adding a connector (required)
A new connector has been created and saved (required)
The path with the new connector has been saved (optional)

States.Name: Path Opened
States.Description: The path workspace is open and ready for connector creation.
WorkshopQuestions: Which two nodes do you want to connect?
Is this a direct connection or does the path need intermediate nodes?
What type of connector will you be using (direct, routed, etc.)?

States.Name: Connector Created
States.Description: A new connector has been created between nodes and saved in the path.
WorkshopQuestions: Do you need to configure connector properties (type, attributes)?
Should you allocate any tags or labels to this connector?
Are there any validation rules or constraints to apply?

States.Name: Path Saved
States.Description: The path with the new connector has been saved, completing the workflow.
WorkshopQuestions: Did the connector save successfully without errors?
Are there any other connectors you need to add to this path?
Should you validate the entire path topology now?

States.Name: Path Edited
States.Description: the user has edited the path.
WorkshopQuestions: When you add a connector to an existing path, what information do you typically need to search for and locate the correct path — for example, do you search by path name, ID, region, or something else?
After a new connector is added and the path is saved, are there any approval steps, notifications, or downstream teams that need to be informed before the change is considered complete?
Are there situations where adding a connector to a path would need to be rolled back or undone — and if so, how do you currently handle reversing that kind of change?

Actions.Name: Create Connector
Actions.Description: Create a connector between the selected start and end nodes

Actions.Name: Configure Connector Properties
Actions.Description: Set the connector type, attributes, and other properties

Actions.Name: Save Path Changes
Actions.Description: Save the path with the new connector
